{"mermaidDiagram": "graph TB subgraph "Internet" Users[Users] end subgraph "DMZ" WAF[WAF] APIGateway[API Gateway] end subgraph "Azure Cloud" ReactFrontend[React Frontend] NodejsAPI[Node.js API] AzureIoTHub[Azure IoT Hub] AzureKeyVault[Azure Key Vault] PostgreSQL[(PostgreSQL DB
AES-256)] RedisCache[(Redis Cache)] end subgraph "AWS Cloud" SageMakerEndpoint[SageMaker ML Endpoint] AWSKMS[AWS KMS] end subgraph "Application Layer" PythonMLService[Python ML Service] KafkaStreaming[Kafka Event Streaming] end subgraph "PETRONAS Internal" SAPPM[SAP PM Module] Maximo[Maximo CMMS] PIHistorian[PI Historian] EmailSMTP[Email SMTP Server] AzureAD[Azure AD SSO] end subgraph "Field Equipment" IoTSensors[Refinery IoT Sensors] end Users -->|HTTPS/TLS1.3| WAF WAF -->|HTTPS| ReactFrontend ReactFrontend -->|HTTPS/JWT| APIGateway APIGateway -->|HTTPS| NodejsAPI NodejsAPI -->|TLS| PostgreSQL NodejsAPI -->|TLS| RedisCache NodejsAPI -->|HTTPS| PythonMLService PythonMLService -->|HTTPS| SageMakerEndpoint NodejsAPI -->|SASL_SSL| KafkaStreaming IoTSensors -->|AMQP/TLS| AzureIoTHub AzureIoTHub -->|AMQP| PythonMLService NodejsAPI -->|RFC| SAPPM NodejsAPI -->|REST/HTTPS| Maximo PythonMLService -->|OPC-UA| PIHistorian NodejsAPI -->|SMTP/TLS| EmailSMTP Users -->|SAML2.0| AzureAD AzureAD -->|OAuth2.0| NodejsAPI NodejsAPI -->|HTTPS| AzureKeyVault PythonMLService -->|HTTPS| AWSKMS", "integrations": [{"source": "React Frontend", "target": "Node.js API Gateway", "protocol": "HTTPS/JWT", "type": "API", "direction": "bidirectional"}, {"source": "Node.js API Gateway", "target": "SAP PM", "protocol": "RFC", "type": "ERP Integration", "direction": "bidirectional"}, {"source": "Node.js API Gateway", "target": "Maximo", "protocol": "REST API", "type": "CMMS Integration", "direction": "bidirectional"}, {"source": "Python ML Service", "target": "PI Historian", "protocol": "OPC-UA", "type": "Data Integration", "direction": "inbound"}, {"source": "IoT Sensors", "target": "Azure IoT Hub", "protocol": "AMQP", "type": "IoT Data Ingestion", "direction": "inbound"}, {"source": "Python ML Service", "target": "AWS SageMaker", "protocol": "HTTPS", "type": "ML Inference", "direction": "outbound"}, {"source": "Application", "target": "Email Server", "protocol": "SMTP", "type": "Notification", "direction": "outbound"}], "toeClassification": [{"component": "React", "category": "Application", "classification": "TOE Default", "notes": "Standard frontend framework for enterprise applications"}, {"component": "Node.js", "category": "Application", "classification": "TOE Default", "notes": "Approved runtime for API development"}, {"component": "Python", "category": "Application", "classification": "TOE Default", "notes": "Standard for ML/data science workloads"}, {"component": "PostgreSQL", "category": "Data", "classification": "TOE Default", "notes": "Approved enterprise database"}, {"component": "Redis", "category": "Data", "classification": "TOE Default", "notes": "Standard caching solution"}, {"component": "Apache Kafka", "category": "Infrastructure", "classification": "TOE Default", "notes": "Approved event streaming platform"}, {"component": "Azure IoT Hub", "category": "Infrastructure", "classification": "TOE Default", "notes": "Microsoft Azure managed service"}, {"component": "AWS SageMaker", "category": "Infrastructure", "classification": "Step-Out", "notes": "Multi-cloud approach requires justification for AWS services"}, {"component": "Azure Key Vault", "category": "Security", "classification": "TOE Default", "notes": "Standard key management service"}, {"component": "AWS KMS", "category": "Security", "classification": "Step-Out", "notes": "Dual key management systems increase complexity"}], "riskFlags": [{"severity": "High", "title": "Multi-Cloud Key Management Complexity", "rationale": "Using both Azure Key Vault and AWS KMS creates operational complexity and potential security gaps in key lifecycle management across cloud providers", "confidence": 85}, {"severity": "High", "title": "Cross-Cloud Data Transfer Risks", "rationale": "ML inference service transferring data between Azure IoT Hub and AWS SageMaker may expose sensitive operational data during transit and increase latency", "confidence": 90}, {"severity": "Medium", "title": "Legacy Integration Protocol Risk", "rationale": "SAP PM integration via RFC protocol may not provide adequate security controls compared to modern REST APIs with proper authentication", "confidence": 75}, {"severity": "Medium", "title": "IoT Device Security Gap", "rationale": "No explicit mention of IoT device authentication, firmware management, or device certificate lifecycle management for refinery sensors", "confidence": 80}, {"severity": "Medium", "title": "Warm Standby DR Limitation", "rationale": "4-hour RTO with warm standby may be insufficient for critical refinery operations where equipment failures could have safety implications", "confidence": 70}, {"severity": "Low", "title": "Data Retention Compliance", "rationale": "7-year retention period for operational data needs validation against PETRONAS data governance policies and regulatory requirements", "confidence": 60}], "recommendations": [{"title": "Consolidate Key Management", "text": "Standardize on Azure Key Vault for all cryptographic operations. If AWS services are required, use Azure Key Vault as the primary key store and establish secure key federation protocols."}, {"title": "Implement Cloud-Agnostic ML Pipeline", "text": "Consider deploying ML models using containerized solutions (Azure Container Instances or AKS) to reduce dependency on AWS SageMaker and minimize cross-cloud data transfer."}, {"title": "Enhance IoT Security Framework", "text": "Implement device identity certificates, regular firmware update mechanisms, and device attestation protocols. Consider Azure IoT Device Provisioning Service for secure device onboarding."}, {"title": "Upgrade SAP Integration Security", "text": "Migrate from RFC to SAP OData services or REST APIs with OAuth 2.0 authentication to improve security posture and align with modern integration patterns."}, {"title": "Evaluate DR Requirements", "text": "Assess if 4-hour RTO meets business continuity requirements for critical refinery operations. Consider active-active configuration for mission-critical components."}, {"title": "Implement Zero Trust Architecture", "text": "Add network microsegmentation, implement least-privilege access controls, and ensure all inter-service communications use mTLS with certificate rotation."}]}
